description: Admin dashboard overview, user/product/order management, verifications & approvals, financials, messages, profile, and notifications

admin-dashboard.description: Platform overview KPIs and generate financial report modal

admin-users.description: Buyer/seller management tables, profile modals, generate report

admin-products.description: Product management grid, product details modal, generate report

admin-orders.description: Order management table and generate report modal

admin-verifications.description: Farmer verification review, approvals tabs (all/orders/products/new seller), report modal

admin-financials.description: Payout management, revenue charts, transaction history, generate report

notes: Admin nav: Dashboard · Users · Products · Orders · Messages · Verifications & Approvals · Financials
Generate Financial Report modal appears across multiple admin sections (shared component)
Verification queue uses Verifications vs Approvals sub-tabs with expanded farmer credential review
